name: getNextCANdbFilename
title: getNextCANdbFilename
syntax: dword getNextCANdbFilename( dword pos, char buffer[], dword size);
description: Finds out the file names of the other assigned databases with pos.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.description: Position number of the database to be found.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: Buffer in which the database file name is written.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in Byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
